subject: feat(infra): cross-fleet alignment — 28-part compliance sweep
body:
Implements all 28 items from the cross-fleet alignment spec:
- Parts 1-4: Remove HISTORY.md and all references (git tracks history)
- Part 5: Clean completed items from TODO.md
- Parts 6-7: Replace inline SUGGESTED IMPLEMENTATIONS with glow-props pointer
- Parts 8-9: Add AI Note + prohibition for pattern fetching
- Parts 10-12: Add Communication section, update header, dedupe AI Notes
- Parts 13-14: BurgerMenu component replacing inline mobile overflow menu
  (44px trigger, role="menu", arrow keys, focus trap, escape, backdrop)
- Part 15: Console.error/warn interception in debugLog.ts
- Part 16: DebugPill switched to inline styles (survives CSS load failure)
- Part 17: PWA diagnostics tab in DebugPill (HTTPS, SW, manifest, standalone)
- Part 18: Pre-React inline error pill in index.html (20s boot timeout)
- Part 19: PDF export skipped (documented in AI Notes)
- Parts 20-21: Visibility-based SW update checks + 30s post-update suppression
- Part 22: Z-index normalized to standard scale (30/40/50/60/70/80)
- Parts 23-25: Icon cache busting (SHA-256 hashes on HTML + manifest + workbox)
- Part 26: Tripwire test for icon cache busting
- Part 27: "Icon looks outdated?" collapsible in install instructions modal
- Part 28: Typed EventMap for event bus (compile-time payload checking)

Tags: cross-fleet, alignment, infra, pwa, debug, a11y, eventbus
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-alignment
Semver: minor
